00:19:47	Ameziane Hamlat:	Yes, I remember there were benchmarks in gas benchmarks with cachable precompiles and not cachable precompiles
00:24:03	Łukasz Rozmej:	--Blocks.CachePrecompilesOnBlockProcessing=false
00:24:14	jochem-brouwer:	Heeft gereageerd op "--Blocks.CachePrec..." met 😍
00:24:24	Ameziane Hamlat:	Besu does optimistic parallel transaction execution by default but we can disable it as well.
00:24:27	DanielVF:	Reacted to "--Blocks.CachePrec..." with 👍
00:24:59	Kamil Chodoła:	Jochem - Nethermind runs on benchamrks with that flag already - Reth probably have this cache disabled also
00:25:10	Łukasz Rozmej:	--Blocks.PreWarmStateOnBlockProcessing=false  to remove background pre-warming (of state and precompiles too)
00:25:13	jochem-brouwer:	Antwoord verzenden naar "Jochem - Nethermin..."

Ah right thanks!

00:27:06	Ameziane Hamlat:	Replying to "Besu does optimistic..."
